item.text: I’m checking the codebase directly for the exact construction sites and `AuditSink` impls, and I’ll verify each item with targeted shell searches before answering.

The first pass found a small set of candidate constructor sites and all visible `AuditSink` impls. I’m opening the exact locations now to separate real constructors from pattern matches and examples that only read the event.

I’ve confirmed one constructor in the loop and one synthesized denial in enforcement. I’m doing one broader scan for any alternate construction style so we don’t miss a site that imports the enum variant directly.
One remaining candidate is in the smoke example; I’m opening it to confirm whether it constructs the event or just matches on it.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: `AgentLoop::run` emits `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial` when a requested tool is not in the loop allowlist, then records the denial and stops the iteration.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` synthesizes a `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial` when it sees a disallowed `ToolCallRequested` and mirrors the denial into the wrapped sink.

## B. AuditSink implementors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
